content:
Post 1

📉 ASX 200 slipped 18.80pts to 8,785.10 (-0.21%), crossing below its 125-day MA. Energy surged while tech and materials sold off hard. The index is flat year-to-date — all that volatility for nothing. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

🛢️ Energy led all sectors +3.26% as oil names caught a bid. Telcos -2.10%, Materials -2.00%, and IT -1.88% dragged. A classic risk rotation — cyclical defensives in, growth and commodities out. #ASX #energy #ausbiz

Post 3

🔺 STO surged +5.78% to AUD7.50, KAR +6.64% to AUD1.445. Meanwhile WTC shed -7.28% to AUD34.65 — tech's rough session in one number. Energy bid, software sold. #ASX #ausbiz #energy

Post 4

🪙 Gold at AUD5,945.86/oz, silver AUD87.87/oz. With AUD/USD at 0.6934, metals priced firm in local terms. Yet Materials fell 2.00% — gold stocks diverged from spot. #ASX #gold #metals #ausbiz

Post 5

Watch Energy's hold above today's gains. If oil softens overnight, STO and KAR give back fast. Materials down 2.00% two sessions running — is the sector bottoming or breaking? Drop your call below. #ASX #ausbiz #energy #mining
